examples.name: unique_root_tags
category_names
examples.py:
def category_names(spec: dict) -> list:
    """Sorted names of the categories fanned out under root."""
    names = list(spec["categories"].keys())
    names.sort()
    return names

examples.name: total_shelf_items

reachable_from_root
examples.py:
def reachable_from_root(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """Can the target site be reached from root through the gateways?"""
    seen = []
    stack = list(spec["gateways"])
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.append(n)
        stack.extend(spec["links"].get(n, []))
    return spec["target"] in seen
